description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a deploy stage that includes a pages job. The pages job runs on the master branch only, uses the default Docker image, and executes the exact shell commands: mkdir .public, cp -r * .public, and mv .public public. It should publish the resulting public directory as a GitLab Pages artifact by specifying artifacts.paths: public. Ensure the job is assigned to the deploy stage and is restricted to the master branch.
